quote: I feel very much connected to the vision of Greater Israel.
context: Interview with journalist Sharon Gal on i24NEWS. When asked directly whether he supports the vision of Greater Israel, Netanyahu affirmed it without hesitation.
description: Netanyahu describes himself as being on a 'historic and spiritual mission' aligned with the concept of Greater Israel, which envisions Israeli sovereignty extending beyond current borders into parts of Jordan and Egypt.
author: Benjamin Netanyahu

quote: The future of Jerusalem is to expand to Damascus.
context: Bezalel Smotrich, leader of the far-right Religious Zionism party, has repeatedly called for extending Israel's borders to Syria, Lebanon, Jordan, and parts of Saudi Arabia. In March 2023, he gave a speech in Paris behind a podium displaying a map of 'Greater Israel' including Trans-Jordan.
description: Smotrich also declared the Palestinian people to be 'an invention' and stated that building settlements in E1 'buries the idea of a Palestinian state'. His territorial claims are based on religious texts predicting the expansion of Jewish sovereignty from the Nile to the Euphrates.
author: Bezalel Smotrich

quote: It would be fine if they took it all.
context: Interview with Tucker Carlson. Carlson described the biblical borders promised to the descendants of Abraham — from the Nile to the Euphrates, encompassing Lebanon, Syria, Jordan, and parts of Saudi Arabia and Egypt. Huckabee responded with this statement.
description: Huckabee later attempted to walk back his statement, calling it 'a somewhat hyperbolic statement', while still leaving the door open to Israeli expansionism based on his religious interpretation. The comment drew near-unanimous condemnation from Middle Eastern countries including UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Jordan, and Qatar.
author: Mike Huckabee

quote: I have ordered a complete siege on the Gaza Strip. There will be no electricity, no food, no fuel, everything is closed. We are fighting human animals and we are acting accordingly.
context: Statement made on 9 October 2023, announcing a complete siege on Gaza.
author: Yoav Gallant

quote: Erase Gaza. Nothing else will satisfy us. Do not leave a child there, expel all the remaining ones at the end, so that they will not have a resurrection.
context: Statement posted on social media on 10 October 2023.
author: Nissim Vaturi

quote: We cannot have women and children getting close to the border... anyone who gets near must get a bullet.
context: Statement by the National Security Minister.
author: Itamar Ben Gvir

quote: It's an entire nation out there that is responsible. This rhetoric about civilians not aware, not involved, it's absolutely not true.
context: Statement made on 13 October 2023 by the President of Israel, holding the entire Palestinian nation responsible.
author: Isaac Herzog

quote: Netanyahu compares Gaza to Amalek, whose memory God calls Israel to erase in the Bible (Deuteronomy 25:19).
context: Netanyahu invoked the biblical reference to Amalek, a tribe God commanded Israel to annihilate, in reference to Gaza.
author: Benjamin Netanyahu

quote: Nuking Gaza is an option. People should go to Ireland or to the desert.
context: Statement made in 2023 by the Heritage Minister, who was subsequently suspended from cabinet meetings.
author: Amichai Eliyahu

quote: Now is time for destruction, annihilation, and devastation.
context: Statement attributed to Ben Gvir.
author: Itamar Ben Gvir

quote: The unequivocal goal of the war we are in the midst of is the complete dismantling of civilian capabilities.
context: Statement made on 9 October 2023 on Channel 14.
author: Bezalel Smotrich

quote: Those are animals, they have no right to exist. I am not debating the way it will happen, but they need to be exterminated.
context: Statement made on 9 October 2023 on Channel 14's 'The Patriots'.
author: Yoav Kisch

quote: I don't care about Gaza. I literally don't care at all. They can go out and swim in the sea. I want to see dead bodies of terrorists around Gaza.
context: Statement made on 13 October 2023.
author: May Golan
role: Minister of the Advancement of the Status of Women

quote: We must not show mercy to cruel people, there is no place for any humanitarian gestures — we must erase the memory of Amalek.
context: Statement made on 16 October 2023, invoking the biblical Amalek reference.
author: Boaz Bismuth

quote: Without hunger and thirst among the Gazan population, we will not succeed in recruiting collaborators, we will not succeed in bribing people with food, drink, medicine, in order to obtain intelligence.
context: Statement made on 23 October 2023.
author: Revital Gotliev

quote: There should be 2 goals for this victory: 1. There is no more Muslim land in the Land of Israel. After we make it the land of Israel, Gaza should be left as a monument, like Sodom.
context: Statement made on 25 October 2023.
author: Amit Halevi

quote: Right now, one goal: Nakba that will overshadow the Nakba of 48. Nakba in Gaza and Nakba to anyone who dares to join!
context: Statement by Israeli Parliament member calling for a second Nakba.
author: Ariel Kallner

quote: We are deploying the Nakba. The Nakba of 2023, that's how it will end.
context: Statement by the Agriculture Minister.
author: Avi Dichter

quote: The children of Gaza have brought this upon themselves.
context: Statement by Israeli Parliament member.
author: Meirav Ben-Ari

quote: There should be no limit to the casualties on civilians in Gaza.
context: Statement by US Senator in support of Israel's military operations.
author: Lindsey Graham

quote: The so-called month of Ramadan must be erased.
context: Statement by the Heritage Minister.
author: Amichai Eliyahu

quote: Hundreds of tons of bombs have already been dropped on the tiny strip. The emphasis is on damage and not on accuracy.
context: Startling admission by IDF spokesperson about the bombing strategy.
author: Daniel Hagari

quote: We made very very impressive achievement here. You look to the right, to the left, you'll see there isn't a building standing. It looks like destruction on a biblical scale.
context: IDF officer describing the destruction in Gaza.
author: IDF Officer

quote: There must be no limit to our response. Until we see hundreds of thousands flee Gaza, the IDF will not have completed its mission.
context: Statement by the Education Minister.
author: Yoav Kisch

quote: Bring down buildings!! Bomb without distinction!! Flatten Gaza. Without mercy! This time, there is no room for mercy!
context: Statement posted on 7 October 2023.
author: Revital Gottlieb

quote: If the goal of this operation is not destruction, occupation, deportation and settlement, we have done nothing. Gaza should be razed and Israel's rule should be restored. This is our country.
context: Statement made on 17 October 2023.
author: Moshe Feiglin
role: Israeli Politician, Leader of Zehut Party

quote: Nakba? Expel them all. If the Egyptians care so much for them — they are welcome to have them wrapped in cellophane tied with a green ribbon.
context: Statement made on 19 October 2023.
author: Nissim Vaturi

quote: Erase all of Gaza from the face of the earth. That the Gazan monsters will fly to the southern fence and try to enter Egyptian territory or they will die and their death will be evil. Gaza should be erased.
context: Statement made on 1 November 2023.
author: Galit Distel Atbaryan

quote: Gaza deserves death. The 2.6 million terrorists in Gaza deserve death! Men, women, and children — in every way possible, we must simply carry out a Holocaust on them — H-O-L-O-C-A-U-S-T! For me, gas chambers. Train cars.
context: Statement posted on 27 May 2025 by a media producer and journalist.
description: Called for 'rivers of blood' and for 'rotting corpses of Gazans to pile up in heaps and then be burned'.
author: Elad Barashi

quote: Sending all Gazans to refugee camps in Lebanon and flattening the whole Strip so it becomes an empty museum like Auschwitz.
context: Proposal by the head of the Metula Council.
author: David Azoulai

quote: They must be exterminated, all of them must be killed.
context: Former football player calling for the complete destruction of Gaza and labeling all people of Gaza as terrorists.
author: Danny Neumann

quote: We are coming to Gaza, we are coming to Lebanon, we are coming to Iran. How many of you will we kill? How many of you will we slaughter? Massacres you cannot imagine. We will kill as many as we want.
context: Statement by a prominent Israeli TV personality.
description: Added: 'We are ready to enter into a confrontation with America and the entire world.'
author: Shai Golden

quote: The international community warns of a humanitarian catastrophe in Gaza and of severe epidemics. We must not shy away from it. Severe epidemics in the south of the Strip will hasten victory. The 'poor' women of Gaza are all the mothers, sisters or wives of Hamas murderers.
context: Statement by former Israeli army general advocating for using epidemics as a weapon.
author: Giora Eiland

quote: The Nakba will be a sweet memory compared to what awaits them.
context: An Israeli soldier declared: 'We are the sons of Joshua who conquered this land against 7 peoples. You remember the Canaanites? The Hittites? The Jebusites? They all disappeared from the face of the earth and Israel is here to stay.'
author: Israeli Soldier

quote: I haven't got compassion for these Gazans. Nobody in Israel should have compassion for these Gazans. Not for the adults, not for the elderly, not for the young and the children. As far as I'm concerned, I don't care! Let them all die!
context: Statement made on Israeli television by a journalist at the Knesset.
author: Yaki Adamker

quote: Every person above 4 years old in Gaza is responsible.
context: Former Mossad official declaring that anyone over 4 years old in Gaza is responsible.
author: Rami Igra
role: Former Head of MIA Unit, Mossad

quote: Yes, we say that we want to take their land, to take over the sea and to settle down, because only that way will they understand that we beat them.
context: Journalist on Israeli media discussing the goals regarding Palestinian territory.
author: Yinon Magal

quote: The world should thank Israel because they are cleaning the most disgusting toilets in the world.
context: Journalist commenting on the massacre of 100+ Palestinians heading towards food supplies.
author: Emily Amrusi

quote: Kill all Palestinians in Gaza, including infants, children, women, and the elderly.
context: Rabbi urging his IDF students to kill all Palestinians.
author: Rabbi Eliyahu Mali

quote: We burn their village, we need to burn their villages. All soldiers in the army think like me.
context: Popular singer on a TV set, applauded by the audience.
author: Kobi Peretz

quote: Comparing Palestinians to animals is insulting to the animals, because they are less than animals.
context: Statement by an Israeli academic.
author: Mordechai Kedar

quote: If we were dealing with people, we would send humanitarian aid to Gaza, but we are dealing with animals.
context: Statement by a prominent rabbi.
author: Rabbi Meir Mazuz

quote: The war is not against Hamas only, but against all the civilians.
context: Statement by an IDF soldier.
author: IDF Soldier

quote: We will end things inside Gaza. I have removed all restraints. Attack everything, kill those who fight us. Through the air, land, with tanks, with bulldozers, by all means, there are no compromises. Gaza will not return to what it was.
context: Statement on Channel 14 on 9 October 2023.
author: Yoav Gallant

quote: We are the people of the light, they are the people of darkness... we shall realize the prophecy of Isaiah.
context: Statement made on 25 October 2023.
author: Benjamin Netanyahu

quote: Every child, every baby in Gaza is an enemy. The enemy is not Hamas... We need to conquer Gaza and colonize it and not leave a single Gazan child there. There is no other victory.
context: Statement on Channel 14.
author: Moshe Feiglin

quote: When you fight against a group like this, the distinction that exists in a normal world no longer exists.
context: Likud MP responding to an NGO official proposing not to deprive children of care, on 8 May 2025.
description: Halevi stated he was 'not sure' the NGO representative was speaking for them when she said they wanted to treat every child and woman.
author: Amit Halevi

quote: The Palestinians of Gaza are scoundrels, subhumans. The children and women must be separated and the adults of Gaza must be eliminated.
context: Statement on Kol Barama radio, 23 February 2025.
author: Nissim Vaturi

quote: I want to completely starve Gaza.
context: Statement on Channel 14, 25 April 2025.
author: Moshe Saada

quote: We killed civilians who were then listed as terrorists. The killing of Palestinians turned into a competition between units. If division 99 kills 150, the next unit aims for 200.
context: Officer of the 252nd division speaking to Haaretz newspaper.
author: IDF Officer, 252nd Division

quote: Women, babies, pregnant women in Gaza are enemies to be eliminated.
context: Statement by journalist Eliyahu Yossian on 27 December 2023.
author: Eliyahu Yossian

quote: The goal of the operation is to send Gaza back to the Middle Ages. Only then will Israel be calm for forty years.
context: Statement made in 2012.
author: Eli Yishai

quote: The residents of Gaza are not innocent. We need to flatten entire neighborhoods in Gaza. Flatten all of Gaza. The Americans didn't stop with Hiroshima. There should be no electricity in Gaza, no gasoline or moving vehicles, nothing.
context: Statement made in 2012, comparing the situation to Hiroshima and Nagasaki.
author: Gilad Sharon
role: Son of Former PM Ariel Sharon

quote: I'm proud to be a racist.
context: Statement made in 2012, before becoming Minister of Women Empowerment.
author: May Golan
